phases.title: Foundation — Fix, Optimize, Launch
phases.description: Quick wins that create immediate momentum. Website technical fixes — resolve broken links, add missing schema markup, fix canonical tags, optimize images for speed. On-page SEO repair — write unique meta titles and descriptions for every page, fix duplicate H1 tags. GBP optimization — complete profile, add categories, photos, services, and business description. Review generation launch — deploy automated review request system to start closing the review gap. NAP cleanup — correct inconsistent listings across 13 directories identified in audit. Call tracking setup — install tracking lines to measure every lead source from day one.

phases.title: Growth — Activate & Accelerate
phases.description: Turn on revenue-generating channels. Google Ads launch — target high-intent keywords identified in keyword analysis with conversion tracking. Local Services Ads setup — apply for Google Guaranteed badge, launch pay-per-lead ads. SEO content strategy — begin addressing duplicate content and creating unique service/location pages. Social media reactivation — restart posting cadence on Facebook and Instagram with branded content. AI visibility groundwork — structured data, content authority signals, and business information consistency.

phases.title: Scale — Compound & Dominate
phases.description: Build lasting competitive advantage. Link building campaign — targeted outreach to close the domain authority gap identified in competitive analysis. Meta/Facebook Ads launch — paid social targeting business owners in service area with seasonal offers. Content marketing cadence — blog posts, FAQ content, and educational articles targeting AI and organic visibility. Performance benchmarking — measure progress against baseline scores from this audit. Competitive monitoring — track competitor movements in rankings, reviews, and ad activity.

packages.name: Good
packages.zoneAdjustment: Estimated monthly investment to Allegiant $8,975 + Ad Spend $19,000 = Total $27,975 + one-time setup costs

packages.name: Better
packages.zoneAdjustment: Estimated monthly investment to Allegiant $16,445 + Ad Spend $47,500 = Total $63,945 + one-time setup costs

packages.name: Great
packages.zoneAdjustment: Estimated monthly investment to Allegiant $22,945 + Ad Spend $95,000 = Total $117,945 + one-time setup costs

packages.name: Best
packages.zoneAdjustment: Estimated monthly investment to Allegiant $30,445–$35,445 + Ad Spend $185,000 = Total $215,445–$220,445 + one-time setup costs
